welcome.name_prompt: Amma ba mu san sunanka ba tukuna.

phone.headline: Mene ne lambar ka?
phone.body: Za mu aiko maka lambar. Seconds biyu ne.
phone.verified_body: An tabbatar da lambar ka. Abu ɗaya ya rage.
phone.consent_text: Na yarda in karɓi saƙonni daga Mingla ta hanyar SMS ko kiran waya, ciki har da lambobin tabbatarwa, gayyatar abokai, da tunatarwa. Ka amsa STOP don dakatar ko HELP don taimako. Duba
phone.consent_accessibility: Na yarda in karɓi saƙonni daga Mingla
phone.country_accessibility: Ƙasar da aka zaɓa: {{name}}. Danna don canzawa.

otp.headline: Shigar da lambar
otp.channel_label: Bai iso ba? Gwada wata hanya:
otp.call_me: Ki ra ni a maimakon haka
otp.error_max_attempts: Gwaji uku, bai yi ba. Gwada wata hanya a ƙasa.
otp.error_wrong_code: Lambar bai yi daidai ba. Sake gwadawa.

gender.headline: Gaya mana game da kai.
gender.body: Don mu sami maka abubuwan da suka dace.

details.headline: Kusan gama.
details.body: Bayanan farko kaɗan. Za mu kula da sauran.
details.country_helper: Yana saita kuɗin ka da ma'aunin awo

value_prop.beat1_headline: Ka san inda za ka je.

intents.headline: Yanzu sashen nishaɗi.
intents.body: Danna kowane yanayin da yake yi maka.
intents.caption: Zaɓi waɗanda suka faranta maka rai.
intents.adventurous_desc: Bincika abin da ba a zata ba

location.settings_body:
An kashe wurin ga Mingla.
Buɗa shi a Saituna don mu same maka
wurare mafi kyau kusa da kai.
location.type_city: Rubuta birni na a maimakon haka
location.error_headline: Ba a iya samun wurin ka ba
location.error_body:
Siginar ya yi rauni ko GPS yana ɗumamar.
Sake gwadawa ko rubuta birni ka.
location.idle_body:
Kunna GPS don mu same maka
wurare na musamman a kusa da kai.

celebration.headline: Ga shi yanzu.
celebration.body: Zaɓe huɗu cikin sauri ka gama.

manual_location.headline: Saka alamar ka a taswirar
manual_location.body: Ba mu adireshin ka na daidai — har zuwa titin — za mu buɗe maka wurare mafi kyau kusa da kai.
manual_location.no_results: Hmm, ba mu ji ba. Gwada wani titi ko unguwa kusa.
manual_location.helper: Yawancin daidaitawa, yawancin shawarwarin da suka dace.
manual_location.privacy: Wurin ka na daidai yana tsakaninmu. Kullum.

categories.headline: Wanne irin wurare kake so?
categories.body: Zaɓi waɗanda suka dace da ɗabi'arka.

transport.headline: Yaya kake tafiya?
transport.body: Yana taimaka mana mu ƙididdige lokacin tafiya.

travel_time.headline: Zuwa ina za ka je?
travel_time.caption: Har zuwa minti {{minutes}} ta {{mode}}
travel_time.error: Ba a iya adana zaɓin ka ba. Danna Sake gwadawa.

friends.headline: Ƙungiyar ka ta kusa
friends.body: Ƙara mutanen ka na kusa, sannan ku haɗa. Za ku gano abubuwan da za ku yi tare, ku ga abin da suke so, ku shirya abubuwa masu kyau tare.
friends.empty_state: Babu abokai a nan tukuna. Ƙara wanda za ka shirya shiri da shi.
friends.pair_wants: Yana son ya haɗa da kai
friends.pair_curated: Duba abubuwan da aka zaɓa don ku biyu.
friends.alert_self_message: Ba za ka iya ƙara kanka a matsayin aboki ba.
friends.alert_duplicate_message: Wannan mutumin yana cikin jerin ka.
friends.alert_pair_error: Ba a iya aika buƙatar haɗawa ba
friends.alert_accept_error: Ba a iya karɓar buƙatar haɗawa. Sake gwadawa.
friends.alert_decline_error: Ba a iya ƙin buƙatar haɗawa. Sake gwadawa.
friends.alert_generic_error: Ba a iya gudanar da buƙatar. Sake gwadawa.
friends.share_message: Sannu! Ka shigo Mingla mu sami abubuwa masu ban sha'awa tare. https://usemingla.com

collaborations.headline: Shirya wani abu tare
collaborations.body: Fara zama tare da ƙungiyar ka. Gano abubuwan da za ku yi, jefa ƙuri'a akan abin da kuka fi so, ku sa ya faru.
collaborations.session_name_placeholder: misali Shirye-shiryen karshen mako, Ra'ayoyin dare...
collaborations.name_taken_error: An riga an ɗauki wannan sunan. Yi ƙirƙira!
collaborations.generic_error: Hmm, bai yi ba. Sake gwadawa.
collaborations.join_error: Ba a iya shiga zaman ba
collaborations.decline_error: Ba a iya ƙin gayyatar ba
collaborations.empty_state: Fara ƙara abokai — sannan za ka iya shirya tare.

consent.headline: Abu ɗaya cikin sauri
consent.body: Mingla yana amfani da abin da ka raba — zaɓin ka, yanayin ka, wurin ka — don samun abubuwan da za ka fi so. Bayanan ka naka ne. Ba ma sayar da su ba, kuma za ka iya share su kowane lokaci.
